resources.string: "WLAN is turned off and Airplane mode is turned on. Please change these settings by tapping on SETTINGS."
"WLAN is turned off. Please turn on WLAN from SETTINGS."
"You can quickly access the web or connect to WLAN by scanning a QR Code. This function is active while in Basic (Photo) mode. This function can be enabled or disabled from MENU > QR Code reader."
Tap to connect to WLAN network \"%1$s\"
"You can quickly access the web or connect to WLAN by scanning a QR Code. This function is active while in Basic (Photo) mode."
